creator: a.pirko@inode.at
text:
Some additional information that might be useful:
The problem also occurs with older versions of firefox (1.5) and also
with thunderbird. Further it can be fixed by installing everything
without gnome (WITHOUT_GNOME, WITHOUT_GNOMEVFS).
The problem occured the first time (for me) when the update to gnome*
2.16 has been made.
-- 
Armin Pirkovitsch
a.pirko@inode.at
